    { name: "Ginecología", color: "text-fuchsia-600", bg: "bg-fuchsia-50" }
];

interface PharmacologyProps {
    initialQuery?: string;
}

export const Pharmacology: React.FC<PharmacologyProps> = ({ initialQuery }) => {
    const [query, setQuery] = useState(initialQuery || '');
    const [selectedDrug, setSelectedDrug] = useState<Drug | null>(null);
    const [filterGroup, setFilterGroup] = useState('ALL');
    const [favorites, setFavorites] = useState<string[]>([]);
    const [activeSection, setActiveSection] = useState<'ADMIN' | 'PREP' | 'SAFETY'>('ADMIN');
    const [listMode, setListMode] = useState<'AZ' | 'GROUP'>('AZ');
    
    // Calculator State
    const [calcWeight, setCalcWeight] = useState('');
    const [calcDose, setCalcDose] = useState('');
    const [calcConc, setCalcConc] = useState(''); // mg/ml
    const [calcType, setCalcType] = useState<'TOTAL' | 'RATE'>('TOTAL');
    
    useEffect(() => {
        if (initialQuery) {
            setQuery(initialQuery);
            const found = STATIC_DRUGS.find(d => d.name.toLowerCase().includes(initialQuery.toLowerCase()));
            if(found) setSelectedDrug(found);
        }
    }, [initialQuery]);

    // Data Processing for List
    const processedList = useMemo(() => {
        let filtered = STATIC_DRUGS.filter(d => {
            const matchesSearch = !query || 
                d.name.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()) || 
                d.brandNames.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()) ||
                d.indications.some(i => i.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()));
            
            const matchesGroup = filterGroup === 'ALL' ? true : filterGroup === 'FAV' ? favorites.includes(d.id) : d.group.includes(filterGroup);
            return matchesSearch && matchesGroup;
        }).sort((a,b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));

        if (listMode === 'AZ') {
            const groups: Record<string, Drug[]> = {};
            filtered.forEach(drug => {
                const letter = drug.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase();
                if(!groups[letter]) groups[letter] = [];
                groups[letter].push(drug);
            });
            return groups;
        } else {
            const groups: Record<string, Drug[]> = {};
            filtered.forEach(drug => {
                const grp = drug.group.split(' ')[0]; // Simplified group name
                if(!groups[grp]) groups[grp] = [];
                groups[grp].push(drug);
            });
            return groups;
        }
    }, [query, filterGroup, favorites, listMode]);

    const sortedKeys = Object.keys(processedList).sort();
    const alphabet = "#ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ".split('');

    const toggleFavorite = (id: string, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
        e.stopPropagation();
        setFavorites(prev => prev.includes(id) ? prev.filter(f => f !== id) : [...prev, id]);
    };

    const calculateResult = () => {
        if(!calcWeight || !calcDose) return "---";
        
        if (calcType === 'TOTAL') {
            // Total dose mg
            const totalMg = parseFloat(calcWeight) * parseFloat(calcDose);
            let volText = "";
            if(calcConc && parseFloat(calcConc) > 0) {
                const ml = totalMg / parseFloat(calcConc);
                volText = `  (${ml.toFixed(1)} ml)`;
            }
            return `${totalMg.toFixed(2)} mg${volText}`;
        } else {
            // Rate ml/h (Dose in mcg/kg/min -> Need Conc mg/ml)
            if(!calcConc || parseFloat(calcConc) <= 0) return "Falta Conc.";
            const doseMcgMin = parseFloat(calcDose) * parseFloat(calcWeight); // mcg/min
            const doseMgHour = (doseMcgMin * 60) / 1000; // mg/h
            const rate = doseMgHour / parseFloat(calcConc); // ml/h
            return `${rate.toFixed(1)} ml/h`;
        }
    };

    const getGroupColor = (group: string) => {
        const g = DRUG_GROUPS.find(gr => group.includes(gr.name.split(' ')[0]));
        return g ? `${g.bg} ${g.color}` : 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-500';
    };

    const getRouteIcon = (route: string) => {
        if (route.toLowerCase().includes('oral')) return <Tablet className="w-3 h-3 text-emerald-500"/>;
        if (route.toLowerCase().includes('iv') || route.toLowerCase().includes('perfusión')) return <Syringe className="w-3 h-3 text-rose-500"/>;
        if (route.toLowerCase().includes('nebulizada') || route.toLowerCase().includes('inhalada')) return <Wind className="w-3 h-3 text-cyan-500"/>;
        return <Pill className="w-3 h-3 text-slate-400"/>;
    };

    return (
        <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row h-full bg-slate-100 gap-0 pb-20 overflow-hidden animate-fade-in text-slate-900">
            
            {/* --- LEFT PANEL: LIST & NAVIGATION --- */}
            <div className={`lg:w-96 bg-white border-r border-slate-200 flex flex-col shrink-0 z-20 shadow-xl ${selectedDrug ? 'hidden lg:flex' : 'flex w-full'}`}>
                
                {/* Header Search */}
                <div className="p-4 bg-slate-900 text-white shrink-0 shadow-md z-10">
                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                        <h2 className="font-black text-xs tracking-widest text-emerald-400 uppercase flex items-center"><BookOpen className="w-4 h-4 mr-2"/> FORMULARIO v20</h2>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                            <span className="text-[10px] bg-slate-800 px-2 py-1 rounded text-slate-400 font-mono border border-slate-700">{STATIC_DRUGS.length} REF</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="relative group">
                        <Search className="absolute left-3 top-2.5 text-slate-500 w-4 h-4 group-focus-within:text-emerald-500 transition-colors"/>
                        <input 
                            value={query}
                            onChange={e => setQuery(e.target.value)}
                            placeholder="Buscar (Ej: Adrenalina, Dolor)..." 
                            className="w-full pl-9 p-2.5 rounded-lg bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 text-sm text-white placeholder-slate-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 outline-none transition-all font-medium"
                        />
                        {query && <button onClick={() => setQuery('')} className="absolute right-3 top-2.5 text-slate-500 hover:text-white"><X className="w-4 h-4"/></button>}
                    </div>
                </div>

                {/* Mode Toggles */}
                <div className="flex border-b border-slate-200 bg-white p-1 gap-1">
                    <button onClick={() => setListMode('AZ')} className={`flex-1 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase rounded-md flex items-center justify-center transition-all ${listMode === 'AZ' ? 'bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 ring-1 ring-indigo-200' : 'text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-50'}`}>
                        <List className="w-3 h-3 mr-1"/> Índice A-Z
                    </button>
                    <button onClick={() => setListMode('GROUP')} className={`flex-1 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase rounded-md flex items-center justify-center transition-all ${listMode === 'GROUP' ? 'bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 ring-1 ring-indigo-200' : 'text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-50'}`}>
                        <Layers className="w-3 h-3 mr-1"/> Grupos
                    </button>
                </div>

                {/* Filters */}
                <div className="flex gap-2 p-2 bg-slate-50 overflow-x-auto border-b border-slate-200 shrink-0 custom-scrollbar shadow-inner">
                    <button onClick={() => setFilterGroup('ALL')} className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md text-[10px] font-bold uppercase whitespace-nowrap border transition-all ${filterGroup === 'ALL' ? 'bg-slate-800 text-white border-slate-900' : 'bg-white border-slate-200 text-slate-500 hover:bg-slate-100'}`}>TODOS</button>
                    <button onClick={() => setFilterGroup('FAV')} className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md text-[10px] font-bold uppercase whitespace-nowrap border flex items-center transition-all ${filterGroup === 'FAV' ? 'bg-yellow-50 text-yellow-700 border-yellow-300' : 'bg-white border-slate-200 text-slate-500 hover:bg-slate-100'}`}><Star className="w-3 h-3 mr-1 fill-current"/> FAVORITOS</button>
                    {DRUG_GROUPS.map(g => (
                        <button key={g.name} onClick={() => setFilterGroup(g.name.split(' ')[0])} className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md text-[10px] font-bold uppercase whitespace-nowrap border transition-all ${filterGroup === g.name.split(' ')[0] ? `${g.bg} ${g.color} border-current` : 'bg-white border-slate-200 text-slate-500 hover:bg-slate-100'}`}>{g.name.split(' ')[0]}</button>
                    ))}
                </div>

                {/* List Content */}
                <div className="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">
                    {listMode === 'AZ' && (
                        <div className="hidden sm:flex flex-col w-6 items-center bg-slate-50 border-r border-slate-200 text-[9px] font-bold text-slate-400 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar hover:text-indigo-600 pt-1 select-none">
                            {alphabet.map(l => (
                                <button key={l} className="w-full text-center hover:bg-slate-200 hover:text-indigo-700 py-0.5 transition-colors">{l}</button>
                            ))}
                        </div>
                    )}
                    <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto bg-white custom-scrollbar">
                        {sortedKeys.map(key => (
                            <div key={key}>
                                <div className="sticky top-0 bg-slate-100 text-slate-500 text-[10px] font-black px-4 py-1.5 border-b border-slate-200 uppercase tracking-widest z-10 flex justify-between items-center shadow-sm">
                                    {key}
                                    <span className="bg-slate-200 px-1.5 rounded text-[9px]">{processedList[key].length}</span>
                                </div>
                                {processedList[key].map(drug => (
                                    <button key={drug.id} onClick={() => setSelectedDrug(drug)} className={`w-full text-left p-3 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all group relative border-l-4 border-b border-slate-50 ${selectedDrug?.id === drug.id ? 'bg-indigo-50 border-l-indigo-600' : 'border-l-transparent hover:border-l-slate-300'}`}>
                                        <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
                                            <div className="pr-2 overflow-hidden w-full">
                                                <div className={`font-black text-sm leading-tight mb-1 flex items-center ${selectedDrug?.id === drug.id ? 'text-indigo-900' : 'text-slate-800'}`}>
                                                    <span className="truncate">{drug.name}</span>
                                                    {drug.safetyAlert.includes("ALTO") && <AlertOctagon className="w-3 h-3 text-rose-500 ml-1.5 inline shrink-0 animate-pulse"/>}
                                                    {drug.safetyAlert.includes("RANGO ESTRECHO") && <Activity className="w-3 h-3 text-purple-500 ml-1.5 inline shrink-0"/>}
                                                    {drug.group === "Inmunosupresores" && <Biohazard className="w-3 h-3 text-yellow-600 ml-1.5 inline shrink-0"/>}
                                                    {drug.storage === 'FRIDGE' && <ThermometerSnowflake className="w-3 h-3 text-blue-500 ml-1.5 inline shrink-0"/>}
                                                    {drug.storage === 'PROTECT_LIGHT' && <Sun className="w-3 h-3 text-amber-500 ml-1.5 inline shrink-0"/>}
                                                </div>
                                                <div className="flex justify-between items-center w-full">
                                                    <div className="flex items-center">
                                                        <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-medium uppercase tracking-wide truncate mr-2">{drug.brandNames.split(',')[0]}</span>
                                                        {getRouteIcon(drug.administrationRoute)}
                                                    </div>
                                                    <span className={`text-[8px] px-1.5 rounded font-bold uppercase ml-2 ${getGroupColor(drug.group)}`}>{drug.group.split(' ')[0]}</span>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                            <div onClick={(e) => toggleFavorite(drug.id, e)} className="p-1 rounded-full hover:bg-slate-200 cursor-pointer shrink-0">
                                                <Star className={`w-4 h-4 ${favorites.includes(drug.id) ? 'fill-yellow-400 text-yellow-400' : 'text-slate-200 group-hover:text-slate-300'}`}/>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </button>
                                ))}
                            </div>
                        ))}
                        {sortedKeys.length === 0 && <div className="p-8 text-center text-slate-400 text-xs italic">No se encontraron fármacos.</div>}
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            {/* --- RIGHT PANEL: MONOGRAPH CONTENT --- */}
            <div className={`flex-1 flex flex-col bg-slate-50 overflow-hidden h-full relative ${!selectedDrug ? 'hidden lg:flex' : 'flex'}`}>
                {selectedDrug ? (
                    <div className="flex flex-col h-full animate-fade-in">
                        
                        {/* Header ISO Safety */}
                        <div className="bg-white border-b border-slate-200 shadow-sm shrink-0 z-10">
                            {/* Safety Banners */}
                            <div className="flex flex-wrap">
                                {selectedDrug.safetyAlert.includes("ALTO") && (
                                    <div className="bg-rose-600 text-white px-4 py-1 flex items-center gap-2 flex-1 justify-center border-r border-rose-500 shadow-inner">
                                        <ShieldAlert className="w-4 h-4 animate-pulse"/>
                                        <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest">ALTO RIESGO</span>
                                    </div>
                                )}
                                {selectedDrug.safetyAlert.includes("CITOSTÁTICO") && (
                                    <div className="bg-purple-700 text-white px-4 py-1 flex items-center gap-2 flex-1 justify-center border-r border-purple-600 shadow-inner">
                                        <Skull className="w-4 h-4"/>
                                        <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest">CITOSTÁTICO</span>
                                    </div>
                                )}
                                {selectedDrug.storage === 'FRIDGE' && (
                                    <div className="bg-blue-500 text-white px-4 py-1 flex items-center gap-2 flex-1 justify-center border-r border-blue-400 shadow-inner">
                                        <ThermometerSnowflake className="w-4 h-4"/>
                                        <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest">NEVERA (2-8ºC)</span>
                                    </div>
                                )}
                                {selectedDrug.storage === 'PROTECT_LIGHT' && (
                                    <div className="bg-amber-500 text-white px-4 py-1 flex items-center gap-2 flex-1 justify-center shadow-inner">
                                        <Sun className="w-4 h-4"/>
                                        <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest">FOTOSENSIBLE</span>
                                    </div>
                                )}
                            </div>

                            <div className="p-5">
                                <div className="flex gap-4 items-start mb-4">
                                    <button onClick={() => setSelectedDrug(null)} className="lg:hidden p-2 bg-slate-100 rounded-full text-slate-500 hover:bg-slate-200"><ArrowLeft className="w-5 h-5"/></button>
                                    <div className="flex-1">
                                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
                                            <span className={`text-[9px] font-black px-2 py-0.5 rounded border uppercase tracking-wide ${getGroupColor(selectedDrug.group)}`}>{selectedDrug.group}</span>
                                            {selectedDrug.pregnancy && (
                                                <span className={`text-[9px] font-black px-2 py-0.5 rounded border uppercase tracking-wide ${['D','X'].includes(selectedDrug.pregnancy) ? 'bg-rose-100 text-rose-700 border-rose-200' : 'bg-green-50 text-green-700 border-green-200'}`}>
                                                    EMBARAZO: CAT {selectedDrug.pregnancy}
                                                </span>
                                            )}
                                        </div>
                                        <h1 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-black text-slate-900 leading-none uppercase tracking-tight">{selectedDrug.name}</h1>
                                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1.5 text-xs font-bold text-slate-500">
                                            <span className="bg-slate-100 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded border border-slate-200 text-[10px] uppercase text-slate-400">Comercial</span>
                                            {selectedDrug.brandNames}
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div className="hidden md:block text-right bg-slate-50 p-2 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 min-w-[140px]">
                                        <div className="text-[9px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase mb-0.5 tracking-wide">PRESENTACIÓN</div>
                                        <div className="text-sm font-bold text-slate-800">{selectedDrug.presentation}</div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                                <div className="flex gap-2 border-t border-slate-100 pt-3 overflow-x-auto">
                                    {[
                                        {id: 'ADMIN', label: 'Administración', icon: Syringe},
                                        {id: 'PREP', label: 'Preparación', icon: FlaskConical},
                                        {id: 'SAFETY', label: 'Seguridad', icon: ShieldAlert}
                                    ].map(tab => (
                                        <button key={tab.id} onClick={() => setActiveSection(tab.id as any)} className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold flex items-center transition-all whitespace-nowrap ${activeSection === tab.id ? 'bg-indigo-600 text-white shadow-md' : 'bg-slate-50 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100'}`}>
                                            <tab.icon className={`w-3.5 h-3.5 mr-2 ${activeSection === tab.id ? 'text-white' : 'text-slate-400'}`}/> {tab.label}
                                        </button>
                                    ))}
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        {/* Content Area */}
                        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar p-6">
                            <div className="flex flex-col xl:flex-row gap-6 max-w-7xl mx-auto">
                                
                                {/* CARD: INFO */}
                                <div className="flex-1 space-y-6">
                                    
                                    {activeSection === 'ADMIN' && (
                                        <div className="space-y-4 animate-fade-in">
                                            <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                                                <div className="bg-white p-5 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm flex gap-4 hover:border-indigo-300 transition-colors group">
                                                    <div className="p-3 bg-emerald-50 rounded-lg text-emerald-600 h-fit group-hover:bg-emerald-100 transition-colors"><Syringe className="w-5 h-5"/></div>
                                                    <div>
                                                        <h4 className="text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">VÍA DE ADMINISTRACIÓN</h4>
                                                        <div className="font-bold text-slate-800 text-sm leading-relaxed">{selectedDrug.administrationRoute}</div>
                                                    </div>
                                                </div>
                                                <div className="bg-white p-5 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm flex gap-4 hover:border-indigo-300 transition-colors group">
                                                    <div className="p-3 bg-blue-50 rounded-lg text-blue-600 h-fit group-hover:bg-blue-100 transition-colors"><Clock className="w-5 h-5"/></div>
                                                    <div>
                                                        <h4 className="text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">TIEMPO / VELOCIDAD</h4>
                                                        <div className="font-bold text-slate-800 text-sm leading-relaxed">{selectedDrug.administrationTime}</div>
                                                    </div>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                            
                                            <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
                                                <div className="bg-amber-50 px-5 py-3 border-b border-amber-100 flex items-center">
                                                    <Activity className="w-4 h-4 text-amber-600 mr-2"/>
                                                    <h3 className="font-black text-amber-800 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide">MONITORIZACIÓN ENFERMERÍA</h3>
                                                </div>
                                                <div className="p-5 text-sm text-slate-700 font-medium leading-relaxed flex items-start">
                                                    <Stethoscope className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-400 mr-3 shrink-0 mt-0.5"/>
                                                    {selectedDrug.monitoring}
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    )}

                                    {activeSection === 'PREP' && (
                                        <div className="space-y-6 animate-fade-in">
                                            <div className="bg-white p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm">
                                                <h3 className="font-black text-slate-800 text-sm uppercase mb-4 flex items-center border-b border-slate-100 pb-2"><Droplets className="w-4 h-4 mr-2 text-indigo-500"/> DILUCIÓN Y ESTABILIDAD</h3>
                                                <div className="bg-indigo-50 p-4 rounded-lg border border-indigo-100 mb-4 text-sm text-indigo-900 font-medium leading-relaxed border-l-4 border-l-indigo-400">
                                                    {selectedDrug.dilution}
                                                </div>
                                                <div className="space-y-2">
                                                    <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase flex items-center"><Zap className="w-3 h-3 mr-1"/> COMPATIBILIDAD (Y-SITE)</h4>
                                                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-700 bg-slate-50 p-3 rounded border border-slate-100 font-medium">{selectedDrug.compatibility}</p>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    )}

                                    {activeSection === 'SAFETY' && (
                                        <div className="space-y-6 animate-fade-in">
                                            {selectedDrug.safetyAlert && (
                                                <div className="bg-rose-50 p-5 rounded-xl border border-rose-200 border-l-4 border-l-rose-500 shadow-sm">
                                                    <h3 className="font-black text-rose-700 text-sm uppercase mb-2 flex items-center"><ShieldAlert className="w-4 h-4 mr-2"/> ALERTA DE SEGURIDAD</h3>
                                                    <p className="text-rose-900 text-sm font-bold leading-relaxed">{selectedDrug.safetyAlert}</p>
                                                </div>
                                            )}
                                            
                                            <div className="bg-white p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm">
                                                <h3 className="font-black text-slate-800 text-sm uppercase mb-4 flex items-center border-b border-slate-100 pb-2"><AlertTriangle className="w-4 h-4 mr-2 text-orange-500"/> RAM / EFECTOS ADVERSOS</h3>
                                                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                                                    {selectedDrug.sideEffects.map((eff, i) => (
                                                        <span key={i} className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 text-xs font-bold rounded-lg border border-slate-200 flex items-center"><Zap className="w-3 h-3 text-orange-400 mr-1.5"/> {eff}</span>
                                                    ))}
                                                </div>
                                            </div>

                                            {selectedDrug.contraindications && (
                                                <div className="bg-white p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm">
                                                    <h3 className="font-black text-slate-800 text-sm uppercase mb-4 flex items-center border-b border-slate-100 pb-2"><Ban className="w-4 h-4 mr-2 text-red-500"/> CONTRAINDICACIONES</h3>
                                                    <ul className="space-y-1 list-disc list-inside text-sm text-slate-700 font-medium">
                                                        {selectedDrug.contraindications.map((c, i) => <li key={i}>{c}</li>)}
                                                    </ul>
                                                </div>
                                            )}
                                        </div>
                                    )}

                                    <div className="bg-white p-5 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm mt-4">
                                        <h3 className="font-black text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase mb-3 tracking-widest ml-1">INDICACIONES APROBADAS</h3>
                                        <div className="grid sm:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                                            {selectedDrug.indications.map((ind, i) => (
                                                <div key={i} className="flex items-center text-xs font-bold text-slate-700 bg-slate-50 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border border-slate-100">
                                                    <CheckCircle className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-emerald-500 mr-2 shrink-0"/> {ind}
                                                </div>
                                            ))}
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    
                                    {selectedDrug.pharmacokinetics && (
                                        <div className="flex gap-4 p-4 bg-slate-100 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 items-center justify-between shadow-inner">
                                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-500 text-xs font-bold uppercase"><Timer className="w-4 h-4"/> Farmacocinética</div>
                                            <div className="flex gap-4 text-xs font-mono text-slate-700">
                                                <span><strong>Inicio:</strong> {selectedDrug.pharmacokinetics.onset}</span>
                                                <span className="text-slate-300">|</span>
                                                <span><strong>Pico:</strong> {selectedDrug.pharmacokinetics.peak}</span>
                                                <span className="text-slate-300">|</span>
                                                <span><strong>Duración:</strong> {selectedDrug.pharmacokinetics.duration}</span>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    )}
                                </div>

                                {/* RIGHT: SMART CALCULATOR WIDGET */}
                                <div className="xl:w-80 shrink-0 space-y-6">
                                    <div className="bg-slate-900 text-white p-6 rounded-xl shadow-lg border border-slate-700 sticky top-4">
                                        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6 border-b border-slate-700 pb-4">
                                            <h3 className="font-black text-sm uppercase flex items-center text-emerald-400 tracking-wide"><Calculator className="w-4 h-4 mr-2"/> CALCULADORA DOSIS</h3>
                                        </div>
                                        <div className="flex bg-slate-800 p-1 rounded-lg mb-4">
                                            <button onClick={()=>setCalcType('TOTAL')} className={`flex-1 py-1 text-[10px] font-bold rounded uppercase transition-all ${calcType === 'TOTAL' ? 'bg-slate-700 text-white shadow ring-1 ring-slate-600' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-300'}`}>DOSIS TOTAL</button>
                                            <button onClick={()=>setCalcType('RATE')} className={`flex-1 py-1 text-[10px] font-bold rounded uppercase transition-all ${calcType === 'RATE' ? 'bg-slate-700 text-white shadow ring-1 ring-slate-600' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-300'}`}>VELOCIDAD</button>
                                        </div>
                                        <div className="space-y-5">
                                            <div>
                                                <label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase block mb-1.5">PESO PACIENTE (KG)</label>
                                                <div className="relative">
                                                    <input type="number" value={calcWeight} onChange={e=>setCalcWeight(e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-600 rounded-lg p-2.5 text-sm font-bold text-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-emerald-500 outline-none placeholder-slate-600 pl-9 transition-all"/>
                                                    <Baby className="absolute left-3 top-2.5 w-4 h-4 text-slate-500"/>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                            <div>
                                                <label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase block mb-1.5">{calcType === 'TOTAL' ? 'DOSIS (MG/KG)' : 'DOSIS (MCG/KG/MIN)'}</label>
                                                <div className="relative">
                                                    <input type="number" value={calcDose} onChange={e=>setCalcDose(e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-600 rounded-lg p-2.5 text-sm font-bold text-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-emerald-500 outline-none placeholder-slate-600 pl-9 transition-all"/>
                                                    <Syringe className="absolute left-3 top-2.5 w-4 h-4 text-slate-500"/>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                            <div>
                                                <label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase block mb-1.5">CONCENTRACIÓN (MG/ML) <span className="text-[9px] text-slate-500 lowercase">(opcional)</span></label>
                                                <div className="relative">
                                                    <input type="number" value={calcConc} onChange={e=>setCalcConc(e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-600 rounded-lg p-2.5 text-sm font-bold text-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-emerald-500 outline-none placeholder-slate-600 pl-9 transition-all"/>
                                                    <Beaker className="absolute left-3 top-2.5 w-4 h-4 text-slate-500"/>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                            <div className="p-4 bg-slate-800 rounded-lg border border-slate-700 mt-2 text-center">
                                                <div className="text-[9px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase mb-1">{calcType === 'TOTAL' ? 'DOSIS TOTAL REQUERIDA' : 'RITMO INFUSIÓN (BOMBA)'}</div>
                                                <div className="text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tight text-emerald-400 leading-none">{calculateResult()}</div>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    
                                    <div className="bg-indigo-50 p-5 rounded-xl border border-indigo-100 shadow-sm">
                                        <h4 className="text-xs font-black text-indigo-800 uppercase mb-3 flex items-center"><Eye className="w-4 h-4 mr-2"/> LOS 5 CORRECTOS</h4>
                                        <ul className="text-[10px] text-indigo-900 space-y-2.5 font-bold uppercase tracking-tight">
                                            <li className="flex items-center"><div className="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-indigo-400 rounded-full mr-2"></div> 1. Paciente Correcto</li>
                                            <li className="flex items-center"><div className="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-indigo-400 rounded-full mr-2"></div> 2. Fármaco Correcto</li>
                                            <li className="flex items-center"><div className="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-indigo-400 rounded-full mr-2"></div> 3. Dosis Correcta</li>
                                            <li className="flex items-center"><div className="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-indigo-400 rounded-full mr-2"></div> 4. Vía Correcta</li>
                                            <li className="flex items-center"><div className="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-indigo-400 rounded-full mr-2"></div> 5. Hora Correcta</li>
                                        </ul>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                ) : (
                    <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-slate-300 select-none pointer-events-none bg-slate-50/50">
                        <div className="w-32 h-32 bg-slate-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-6 shadow-sm border border-slate-200">
                            <Pill className="w-14 h-14 text-slate-300"/>
                        </div>
                        <h3 className="font-black text-xl uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400">Seleccione un Fármaco</h3>
                        <p className="text-sm font-medium text-slate-400 mt-2 max-w-xs text-center">Navegue por el formulario para ver la monografía completa.</p>
                    </div>
                )}
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

    // --- OTROS ORALES Y GENERALES ---
    {
        id: "gen_allo", name: "Alopurinol", brandNames: "Zyloric", group: "Endocrino",
        presentation: "Comprimidos 100mg, 300mg",
        indications: ["Gota (Hiperuricemia)"],
        dilution: "N/A",
        administrationRoute: "Oral.",
        administrationTime: "Con comidas.",
        compatibility: "N/A",
        sideEffects: ["Rash cutáneo (S. Stevens-Johnson raro)", "Molestias GI"],
        monitoring: "Ácido úrico, Función renal.",
        safetyAlert: "Suspender si erupción cutánea (riesgo reacción grave).",
        pregnancy: 'C',
        pharmacokinetics: { onset: "Días", peak: "N/A", duration: "24 h" }
    },
    {
        id: "gen_levo", name: "Levotiroxina", brandNames: "Eutirox", group: "Endocrino",
        presentation: "Comprimidos 25-200 mcg",
        indications: ["Hipotiroidismo"],
        dilution: "N/A",
        administrationRoute: "Oral.",
        administrationTime: "En ayunas (30 min antes desayuno).",
        compatibility: "N/A",
        sideEffects: ["Taquicardia (exceso dosis)", "Insomnio"],
        monitoring: "TSH, T4 libre.",
        safetyAlert: "Rango estrecho. No cambiar de marca sin control.",
        pregnancy: 'A',
        pharmacokinetics: { onset: "Semanas", peak: "N/A", duration: "Semanas" }
    },
    {
        id: "gen_pred", name: "Prednisona", brandNames: "Dacortin", group: "Endocrino",
        presentation: "Comprimidos 2.5mg, 5mg, 30mg",
        indications: ["Inflamación", "Asma", "Autoinmunes"],
        dilution: "N/A",
        administrationRoute: "Oral.",
        administrationTime: "Mañana (ritmo circadiano). Con alimentos.",
        compatibility: "N/A",
        sideEffects: ["Hiperglucemia", "Insomnio", "Osteoporosis (largo plazo)"],
        monitoring: "Glucemia, TA.",
        safetyAlert: "No suspender bruscamente tras uso prolongado (insuficiencia adrenal).",
        pregnancy: 'C',
        pharmacokinetics: { onset: "1-2 h", peak: "1-2 h", duration: "12-36 h" }
    },

    // --- BLOQUEANTES NEUROMUSCULARES (RSI) ---
    {
        id: "nmba1", name: "Rocuronio", brandNames: "Esmeron", group: "Anestesia / UCI",
        presentation: "Vial 50mg/5ml (10mg/ml)",
        indications: ["Intubación (Secuencia Rápida)", "Relajación muscular"],
        dilution: "Directo (RSI) o en 50-100ml SF.",
        administrationRoute: "IV.",
        administrationTime: "Bolus rápido en inducción. Perfusión continua.",
        compatibility: "Incompatible con Hidrocortisona.",
        sideEffects: ["Anafilaxia (raro)", "Parálisis prolongada"],
        monitoring: "TOF (Tren de Cuatro). Requiere ventilación mecánica obligatoria.",
        safetyAlert: "PARALIZANTE. NO SEDA. Asegurar sedación profunda previa.",
        storage: 'FRIDGE',
        pregnancy: 'B',
        pharmacokinetics: { onset: "60-90 seg", peak: "N/A", duration: "30-60 min" }
    }
];

const DRUG_GROUPS = [
    { name: "UCI / Emergencias", color: "text-red-600", bg: "bg-red-50" },
    { name: "Inmunosupresores", color: "text-teal-600", bg: "bg-teal-50" },
    { name: "Anestesia / UCI", color: "text-indigo-600", bg: "bg-indigo-50" },
    { name: "Infectología", color: "text-blue-600", bg: "bg-blue-50" },
    { name: "Antídotos", color: "text-emerald-600", bg: "bg-emerald-50" },
    { name: "Neurología", color: "text-violet-600", bg: "bg-violet-50" },
    { name: "Psiquiatría", color: "text-pink-600", bg: "bg-pink-50" },
    { name: "Analgesia", color: "text-purple-600", bg: "bg-purple-50" },
    { name: "Cardiología", color: "text-rose-600", bg: "bg-rose-50" },
    { name: "Endocrino / Respiratorio", color: "text-orange-600", bg: "bg-orange-50" },
    { name: "Hematología", color: "text-slate-600", bg: "bg-slate-100" },
    { name: "Digestivo", color: "text-emerald-600", bg: "bg-emerald-50" },
    { name: "Ginecología", color: "text-fuchsia-600", bg: "bg-fuchsia-50" }
];

interface PharmacologyProps {
    initialQuery?: string;
}

export const Pharmacology: React.FC<PharmacologyProps> = ({ initialQuery }) => {
    const [query, setQuery] = useState(initialQuery || '');
    const [selectedDrug, setSelectedDrug] = useState<Drug | null>(null);
    const [filterGroup, setFilterGroup] = useState('ALL');
    const [favorites, setFavorites] = useState<string[]>([]);
    const [activeSection, setActiveSection] = useState<'ADMIN' | 'PREP' | 'SAFETY'>('ADMIN');
    const [listMode, setListMode] = useState<'AZ' | 'GROUP'>('AZ');
    
    // Calculator State
    const [calcWeight, setCalcWeight] = useState('');
    const [calcDose, setCalcDose] = useState('');
    const [calcConc, setCalcConc] = useState(''); // mg/ml
    const [calcType, setCalcType] = useState<'TOTAL' | 'RATE'>('TOTAL');
    
    useEffect(() => {
        if (initialQuery) {
            setQuery(initialQuery);
            const found = STATIC_DRUGS.find(d => d.name.toLowerCase().includes(initialQuery.toLowerCase()));
            if(found) setSelectedDrug(found);
        }
    }, [initialQuery]);

    // Data Processing for List
    const processedList = useMemo(() => {
        let filtered = STATIC_DRUGS.filter(d => {
            const matchesSearch = !query || 
                d.name.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()) || 
                d.brandNames.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()) ||
                d.indications.some(i => i.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()));
            
            const matchesGroup = filterGroup === 'ALL' ? true : filterGroup === 'FAV' ? favorites.includes(d.id) : d.group.includes(filterGroup);
            return matchesSearch && matchesGroup;
        }).sort((a,b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));

        if (listMode === 'AZ') {
            const groups: Record<string, Drug[]> = {};
            filtered.forEach(drug => {
                const letter = drug.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase();
                if(!groups[letter]) groups[letter] = [];
                groups[letter].push(drug);
            });
            return groups;
        } else {
            const groups: Record<string, Drug[]> = {};
            filtered.forEach(drug => {
                const grp = drug.group.split(' ')[0]; // Simplified group name
                if(!groups[grp]) groups[grp] = [];
                groups[grp].push(drug);
            });
            return groups;
        }
    }, [query, filterGroup, favorites, listMode]);

    const sortedKeys = Object.keys(processedList).sort();
    const alphabet = "#ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ".split('');

    const toggleFavorite = (id: string, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
        e.stopPropagation();
        setFavorites(prev => prev.includes(id) ? prev.filter(f => f !== id) : [...prev, id]);
    };

    const calculateResult = () => {
        if(!calcWeight || !calcDose) return "---";
        
        if (calcType === 'TOTAL') {
            // Total dose mg
            const totalMg = parseFloat(calcWeight) * parseFloat(calcDose);
            let volText = "";
            if(calcConc && parseFloat(calcConc) > 0) {
                const ml = totalMg / parseFloat(calcConc);
                volText = `  (${ml.toFixed(1)} ml)`;
            }
            return `${totalMg.toFixed(2)} mg${volText}`;
        } else {
            // Rate ml/h (Dose in mcg/kg/min -> Need Conc mg/ml)
            if(!calcConc || parseFloat(calcConc) <= 0) return "Falta Conc.";
            const doseMcgMin = parseFloat(calcDose) * parseFloat(calcWeight); // mcg/min
            const doseMgHour = (doseMcgMin * 60) / 1000; // mg/h
            const rate = doseMgHour / parseFloat(calcConc); // ml/h
            return `${rate.toFixed(1)} ml/h`;
        }
    };

    const getGroupColor = (group: string) => {
        const g = DRUG_GROUPS.find(gr => group.includes(gr.name.split(' ')[0]));
        return g ? `${g.bg} ${g.color}` : 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-500';
    };

    const getRouteIcon = (route: string) => {
        if (route.toLowerCase().includes('oral')) return <Tablet className="w-3 h-3 text-emerald-500"/>;
        if (route.toLowerCase().includes('iv') || route.toLowerCase().includes('perfusión')) return <Syringe className="w-3 h-3 text-rose-500"/>;
        if (route.toLowerCase().includes('nebulizada') || route.toLowerCase().includes('inhalada')) return <Wind className="w-3 h-3 text-cyan-500"/>;
        return <Pill className="w-3 h-3 text-slate-400"/>;
    };

    return (
        <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row h-full bg-slate-100 gap-0 pb-20 overflow-hidden animate-fade-in text-slate-900">
            
            {/* --- LEFT PANEL: LIST & NAVIGATION --- */}
            <div className={`lg:w-96 bg-white border-r border-slate-200 flex flex-col shrink-0 z-20 shadow-xl ${selectedDrug ? 'hidden lg:flex' : 'flex w-full'}`}>
                
                {/* Header Search */}
                <div className="p-4 bg-slate-900 text-white shrink-0 shadow-md z-10">
                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                        <h2 className="font-black text-xs tracking-widest text-emerald-400 uppercase flex items-center"><BookOpen className="w-4 h-4 mr-2"/> FORMULARIO v20</h2>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                            <span className="text-[10px] bg-slate-800 px-2 py-1 rounded text-slate-400 font-mono border border-slate-700">{STATIC_DRUGS.length} REF</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="relative group">
                        <Search className="absolute left-3 top-2.5 text-slate-500 w-4 h-4 group-focus-within:text-emerald-500 transition-colors"/>
                        <input 
                            value={query}
                            onChange={e => setQuery(e.target.value)}
                            placeholder="Buscar (Ej: Adrenalina, Dolor)..." 
                            className="w-full pl-9 p-2.5 rounded-lg bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 text-sm text-white placeholder-slate-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 outline-none transition-all font-medium"
                        />
                        {query && <button onClick={() => setQuery('')} className="absolute right-3 top-2.5 text-slate-500 hover:text-white"><X className="w-4 h-4"/></button>}
                    </div>
                </div>

                {/* Mode Toggles */}
                <div className="flex border-b border-slate-200 bg-white p-1 gap-1">
                    <button onClick={() => setListMode('AZ')} className={`flex-1 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase rounded-md flex items-center justify-center transition-all ${listMode === 'AZ' ? 'bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 ring-1 ring-indigo-200' : 'text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-50'}`}>
                        <List className="w-3 h-3 mr-1"/> Índice A-Z
                    </button>
                    <button onClick={() => setListMode('GROUP')} className={`flex-1 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase rounded-md flex items-center justify-center transition-all ${listMode === 'GROUP' ? 'bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 ring-1 ring-indigo-200' : 'text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-50'}`}>
                        <Layers className="w-3 h-3 mr-1"/> Grupos
                    </button>
                </div>

                {/* Filters */}
                <div className="flex gap-2 p-2 bg-slate-50 overflow-x-auto border-b border-slate-200 shrink-0 custom-scrollbar shadow-inner">
                    <button onClick={() => setFilterGroup('ALL')} className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md text-[10px] font-bold uppercase whitespace-nowrap border transition-all ${filterGroup === 'ALL' ? 'bg-slate-800 text-white border-slate-900' : 'bg-white border-slate-200 text-slate-500 hover:bg-slate-100'}`}>TODOS</button>
                    <button onClick={() => setFilterGroup('FAV')} className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md text-[10px] font-bold uppercase whitespace-nowrap border flex items-center transition-all ${filterGroup === 'FAV' ? 'bg-yellow-50 text-yellow-700 border-yellow-300' : 'bg-white border-slate-200 text-slate-500 hover:bg-slate-100'}`}><Star className="w-3 h-3 mr-1 fill-current"/> FAVORITOS</button>
                    {DRUG_GROUPS.map(g => (
                        <button key={g.name} onClick={() => setFilterGroup(g.name.split(' ')[0])} className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md text-[10px] font-bold uppercase whitespace-nowrap border transition-all ${filterGroup === g.name.split(' ')[0] ? `${g.bg} ${g.color} border-current` : 'bg-white border-slate-200 text-slate-500 hover:bg-slate-100'}`}>{g.name.split(' ')[0]}</button>
                    ))}
                </div>

                {/* List Content */}
                <div className="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">
                    {listMode === 'AZ' && (
                        <div className="hidden sm:flex flex-col w-6 items-center bg-slate-50 border-r border-slate-200 text-[9px] font-bold text-slate-400 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar hover:text-indigo-600 pt-1 select-none">
                            {alphabet.map(l => (
                                <button key={l} className="w-full text-center hover:bg-slate-200 hover:text-indigo-700 py-0.5 transition-colors">{l}</button>
                            ))}
                        </div>
                    )}
                    <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto bg-white custom-scrollbar">
                        {sortedKeys.map(key => (
                            <div key={key}>
                                <div className="sticky top-0 bg-slate-100 text-slate-500 text-[10px] font-black px-4 py-1.5 border-b border-slate-200 uppercase tracking-widest z-10 flex justify-between items-center shadow-sm">
                                    {key}
                                    <span className="bg-slate-200 px-1.5 rounded text-[9px]">{processedList[key].length}</span>
                                </div>
                                {processedList[key].map(drug => (
                                    <button key={drug.id} onClick={() => setSelectedDrug(drug)} className={`w-full text-left p-3 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all group relative border-l-4 border-b border-slate-50 ${selectedDrug?.id === drug.id ? 'bg-indigo-50 border-l-indigo-600' : 'border-l-transparent hover:border-l-slate-300'}`}>
                                        <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
                                            <div className="pr-2 overflow-hidden w-full">
                                                <div className={`font-black text-sm leading-tight mb-1 flex items-center ${selectedDrug?.id === drug.id ? 'text-indigo-900' : 'text-slate-800'}`}>
                                                    <span className="truncate">{drug.name}</span>
                                                    {drug.safetyAlert.includes("ALTO") && <AlertOctagon className="w-3 h-3 text-rose-500 ml-1.5 inline shrink-0 animate-pulse"/>}
                                                    {drug.safetyAlert.includes("RANGO ESTRECHO") && <Activity className="w-3 h-3 text-purple-500 ml-1.5 inline shrink-0"/>}
                                                    {drug.group === "Inmunosupresores" && <Biohazard className="w-3 h-3 text-yellow-600 ml-1.5 inline shrink-0"/>}
                                                    {drug.storage === 'FRIDGE' && <ThermometerSnowflake className="w-3 h-3 text-blue-500 ml-1.5 inline shrink-0"/>}
                                                    {drug.storage === 'PROTECT_LIGHT' && <Sun className="w-3 h-3 text-amber-500 ml-1.5 inline shrink-0"/>}
                                                </div>
                                                <div className="flex justify-between items-center w-full">
                                                    <div className="flex items-center">
                                                        <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-medium uppercase tracking-wide truncate mr-2">{drug.brandNames.split(',')[0]}</span>
                                                        {getRouteIcon(drug.administrationRoute)}
                                                    </div>
                                                    <span className={`text-[8px] px-1.5 rounded font-bold uppercase ml-2 ${getGroupColor(drug.group)}`}>{drug.group.split(' ')[0]}</span>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                            <div onClick={(e) => toggleFavorite(drug.id, e)} className="p-1 rounded-full hover:bg-slate-200 cursor-pointer shrink-0">
                                                <Star className={`w-4 h-4 ${favorites.includes(drug.id) ? 'fill-yellow-400 text-yellow-400' : 'text-slate-200 group-hover:text-slate-300'}`}/>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </button>
                                ))}
                            </div>
                        ))}
                        {sortedKeys.length === 0 && <div className="p-8 text-center text-slate-400 text-xs italic">No se encontraron fármacos.</div>}
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            {/* --- RIGHT PANEL: MONOGRAPH CONTENT --- */}
            <div className={`flex-1 flex flex-col bg-slate-50 overflow-hidden h-full relative ${!selectedDrug ? 'hidden lg:flex' : 'flex'}`}>
                {selectedDrug ? (
                    <div className="flex flex-col h-full animate-fade-in">
                        
                        {/* Header ISO Safety */}
                        <div className="bg-white border-b border-slate-200 shadow-sm shrink-0 z-10">
                            {/* Safety Banners */}
                            <div className="flex flex-wrap">
                                {selectedDrug.safetyAlert.includes("ALTO") && (
                                    <div className="bg-rose-600 text-white px-4 py-1 flex items-center gap-2 flex-1 justify-center border-r border-rose-500 shadow-inner">
                                        <ShieldAlert className="w-4 h-4 animate-pulse"/>
                                        <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest">ALTO RIESGO</span>
                                    </div>
                                )}
                                {selectedDrug.safetyAlert.includes("CITOSTÁTICO") && (
                                    <div className="bg-purple-700 text-white px-4 py-1 flex items-center gap-2 flex-1 justify-center border-r border-purple-600 shadow-inner">
                                        <Skull className="w-4 h-4"/>
                                        <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest">CITOSTÁTICO</span>
                                    </div>
                                )}
                                {selectedDrug.storage === 'FRIDGE' && (
                                    <div className="bg-blue-500 text-white px-4 py-1 flex items-center gap-2 flex-1 justify-center border-r border-blue-400 shadow-inner">
                                        <ThermometerSnowflake className="w-4 h-4"/>
                                        <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest">NEVERA (2-8ºC)</span>
                                    </div>
                                )}
                                {selectedDrug.storage === 'PROTECT_LIGHT' && (
                                    <div className="bg-amber-500 text-white px-4 py-1 flex items-center gap-2 flex-1 justify-center shadow-inner">
                                        <Sun className="w-4 h-4"/>
                                        <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest">FOTOSENSIBLE</span>
                                    </div>
                                )}
                            </div>

                            <div className="p-5">
                                <div className="flex gap-4 items-start mb-4">
                                    <button onClick={() => setSelectedDrug(null)} className="lg:hidden p-2 bg-slate-100 rounded-full text-slate-500 hover:bg-slate-200"><ArrowLeft className="w-5 h-5"/></button>
                                    <div className="flex-1">
                                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
                                            <span className={`text-[9px] font-black px-2 py-0.5 rounded border uppercase tracking-wide ${getGroupColor(selectedDrug.group)}`}>{selectedDrug.group}</span>
                                            {selectedDrug.pregnancy && (
                                                <span className={`text-[9px] font-black px-2 py-0.5 rounded border uppercase tracking-wide ${['D','X'].includes(selectedDrug.pregnancy) ? 'bg-rose-100 text-rose-700 border-rose-200' : 'bg-green-50 text-green-700 border-green-200'}`}>
                                                    EMBARAZO: CAT {selectedDrug.pregnancy}
                                                </span>
                                            )}
                                        </div>
                                        <h1 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-black text-slate-900 leading-none uppercase tracking-tight">{selectedDrug.name}</h1>
                                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1.5 text-xs font-bold text-slate-500">
                                            <span className="bg-slate-100 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded border border-slate-200 text-[10px] uppercase text-slate-400">Comercial</span>
                                            {selectedDrug.brandNames}
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div className="hidden md:block text-right bg-slate-50 p-2 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 min-w-[140px]">
                                        <div className="text-[9px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase mb-0.5 tracking-wide">PRESENTACIÓN</div>
                                        <div className="text-sm font-bold text-slate-800">{selectedDrug.presentation}</div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                                <div className="flex gap-2 border-t border-slate-100 pt-3 overflow-x-auto">
                                    {[
                                        {id: 'ADMIN', label: 'Administración', icon: Syringe},
                                        {id: 'PREP', label: 'Preparación', icon: FlaskConical},
                                        {id: 'SAFETY', label: 'Seguridad', icon: ShieldAlert}
                                    ].map(tab => (
                                        <button key={tab.id} onClick={() => setActiveSection(tab.id as any)} className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold flex items-center transition-all whitespace-nowrap ${activeSection === tab.id ? 'bg-indigo-600 text-white shadow-md' : 'bg-slate-50 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100'}`}>
                                            <tab.icon className={`w-3.5 h-3.5 mr-2 ${activeSection === tab.id ? 'text-white' : 'text-slate-400'}`}/> {tab.label}
                                        </button>
                                    ))}
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        {/* Content Area */}
                        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar p-6">
                            <div className="flex flex-col xl:flex-row gap-6 max-w-7xl mx-auto">
                                
                                {/* CARD: INFO */}
                                <div className="flex-1 space-y-6">
                                    
                                    {activeSection === 'ADMIN' && (
                                        <div className="space-y-4 animate-fade-in">
                                            <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                                                <div className="bg-white p-5 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm flex gap-4 hover:border-indigo-300 transition-colors group">
                                                    <div className="p-3 bg-emerald-50 rounded-lg text-emerald-600 h-fit group-hover:bg-emerald-100 transition-colors"><Syringe className="w-5 h-5"/></div>
                                                    <div>
                                                        <h4 className="text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">VÍA DE ADMINISTRACIÓN</h4>
                                                        <div className="font-bold text-slate-800 text-sm leading-relaxed">{selectedDrug.administrationRoute}</div>
                                                    </div>
                                                </div>
                                                <div className="bg-white p-5 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm flex gap-4 hover:border-indigo-300 transition-colors group">
                                                    <div className="p-3 bg-blue-50 rounded-lg text-blue-600 h-fit group-hover:bg-blue-100 transition-colors"><Clock className="w-5 h-5"/></div>
                                                    <div>
                                                        <h4 className="text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">TIEMPO / VELOCIDAD</h4>
                                                        <div className="font-bold text-slate-800 text-sm leading-relaxed">{selectedDrug.administrationTime}</div>
                                                    </div>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                            
                                            <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
                                                <div className="bg-amber-50 px-5 py-3 border-b border-amber-100 flex items-center">
                                                    <Activity className="w-4 h-4 text-amber-600 mr-2"/>
                                                    <h3 className="font-black text-amber-800 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide">MONITORIZACIÓN ENFERMERÍA</h3>
                                                </div>
                                                <div className="p-5 text-sm text-slate-700 font-medium leading-relaxed flex items-start">
                                                    <Stethoscope className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-400 mr-3 shrink-0 mt-0.5"/>
                                                    {selectedDrug.monitoring}
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    )}

                                    {activeSection === 'PREP' && (
                                        <div className="space-y-6 animate-fade-in">
                                            <div className="bg-white p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm">
                                                <h3 className="font-black text-slate-800 text-sm uppercase mb-4 flex items-center border-b border-slate-100 pb-2"><Droplets className="w-4 h-4 mr-2 text-indigo-500"/> DILUCIÓN Y ESTABILIDAD</h3>
                                                <div className="bg-indigo-50 p-4 rounded-lg border border-indigo-100 mb-4 text-sm text-indigo-900 font-medium leading-relaxed border-l-4 border-l-indigo-400">
                                                    {selectedDrug.dilution}
                                                </div>
                                                <div className="space-y-2">
                                                    <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase flex items-center"><Zap className="w-3 h-3 mr-1"/> COMPATIBILIDAD (Y-SITE)</h4>
                                                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-700 bg-slate-50 p-3 rounded border border-slate-100 font-medium">{selectedDrug.compatibility}</p>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    )}

                                    {activeSection === 'SAFETY' && (
                                        <div className="space-y-6 animate-fade-in">
                                            {selectedDrug.safetyAlert && (
                                                <div className="bg-rose-50 p-5 rounded-xl border border-rose-200 border-l-4 border-l-rose-500 shadow-sm">
                                                    <h3 className="font-black text-rose-700 text-sm uppercase mb-2 flex items-center"><ShieldAlert className="w-4 h-4 mr-2"/> ALERTA DE SEGURIDAD</h3>
                                                    <p className="text-rose-900 text-sm font-bold leading-relaxed">{selectedDrug.safetyAlert}</p>
                                                </div>
                                            )}
                                            
                                            <div className="bg-white p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm">
                                                <h3 className="font-black text-slate-800 text-sm uppercase mb-4 flex items-center border-b border-slate-100 pb-2"><AlertTriangle className="w-4 h-4 mr-2 text-orange-500"/> RAM / EFECTOS ADVERSOS</h3>
                                                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                                                    {selectedDrug.sideEffects.map((eff, i) => (
                                                        <span key={i} className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 text-xs font-bold rounded-lg border border-slate-200 flex items-center"><Zap className="w-3 h-3 text-orange-400 mr-1.5"/> {eff}</span>
                                                    ))}
                                                </div>
                                            </div>

                                            {selectedDrug.contraindications && (
                                                <div className="bg-white p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm">
                                                    <h3 className="font-black text-slate-800 text-sm uppercase mb-4 flex items-center border-b border-slate-100 pb-2"><Ban className="w-4 h-4 mr-2 text-red-500"/> CONTRAINDICACIONES</h3>
                                                    <ul className="space-y-1 list-disc list-inside text-sm text-slate-700 font-medium">
                                                        {selectedDrug.contraindications.map((c, i) => <li key={i}>{c}</li>)}
                                                    </ul>
                                                </div>
                                            )}
                                        </div>
                                    )}

                                    <div className="bg-white p-5 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm mt-4">
                                        <h3 className="font-black text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase mb-3 tracking-widest ml-1">INDICACIONES APROBADAS</h3>
                                        <div className="grid sm:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                                            {selectedDrug.indications.map((ind, i) => (
                                                <div key={i} className="flex items-center text-xs font-bold text-slate-700 bg-slate-50 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border border-slate-100">
                                                    <CheckCircle className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-emerald-500 mr-2 shrink-0"/> {ind}
                                                </div>
                                            ))}
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    
                                    {selectedDrug.pharmacokinetics && (
                                        <div className="flex gap-4 p-4 bg-slate-100 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 items-center justify-between shadow-inner">
                                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-500 text-xs font-bold uppercase"><Timer className="w-4 h-4"/> Farmacocinética</div>
                                            <div className="flex gap-4 text-xs font-mono text-slate-700">
                                                <span><strong>Inicio:</strong> {selectedDrug.pharmacokinetics.onset}</span>
                                                <span className="text-slate-300">|</span>
                                                <span><strong>Pico:</strong> {selectedDrug.pharmacokinetics.peak}</span>
                                                <span className="text-slate-300">|</span>
                                                <span><strong>Duración:</strong> {selectedDrug.pharmacokinetics.duration}</span>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    )}
                                </div>

                                {/* RIGHT: SMART CALCULATOR WIDGET */}
                                <div className="xl:w-80 shrink-0 space-y-6">
                                    <div className="bg-slate-900 text-white p-6 rounded-xl shadow-lg border border-slate-700 sticky top-4">
                                        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6 border-b border-slate-700 pb-4">
                                            <h3 className="font-black text-sm uppercase flex items-center text-emerald-400 tracking-wide"><Calculator className="w-4 h-4 mr-2"/> CALCULADORA DOSIS</h3>
                                        </div>
                                        <div className="flex bg-slate-800 p-1 rounded-lg mb-4">
                                            <button onClick={()=>setCalcType('TOTAL')} className={`flex-1 py-1 text-[10px] font-bold rounded uppercase transition-all ${calcType === 'TOTAL' ? 'bg-slate-700 text-white shadow ring-1 ring-slate-600' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-300'}`}>DOSIS TOTAL</button>
                                            <button onClick={()=>setCalcType('RATE')} className={`flex-1 py-1 text-[10px] font-bold rounded uppercase transition-all ${calcType === 'RATE' ? 'bg-slate-700 text-white shadow ring-1 ring-slate-600' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-300'}`}>VELOCIDAD</button>
                                        </div>
                                        <div className="space-y-5">
                                            <div>
                                                <label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase block mb-1.5">PESO PACIENTE (KG)</label>
                                                <div className="relative">
                                                    <input type="number" value={calcWeight} onChange={e=>setCalcWeight(e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-600 rounded-lg p-2.5 text-sm font-bold text-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-emerald-500 outline-none placeholder-slate-600 pl-9 transition-all"/>
                                                    <Baby className="absolute left-3 top-2.5 w-4 h-4 text-slate-500"/>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                            <div>
                                                <label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase block mb-1.5">{calcType === 'TOTAL' ? 'DOSIS (MG/KG)' : 'DOSIS (MCG/KG/MIN)'}</label>
                                                <div className="relative">
                                                    <input type="number" value={calcDose} onChange={e=>setCalcDose(e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-600 rounded-lg p-2.5 text-sm font-bold text-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-emerald-500 outline-none placeholder-slate-600 pl-9 transition-all"/>
                                                    <Syringe className="absolute left-3 top-2.5 w-4 h-4 text-slate-500"/>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                            <div>
                                                <label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase block mb-1.5">CONCENTRACIÓN (MG/ML) <span className="text-[9px] text-slate-500 lowercase">(opcional)</span></label>
                                                <div className="relative">
                                                    <input type="number" value={calcConc} onChange={e=>setCalcConc(e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-600 rounded-lg p-2.5 text-sm font-bold text-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-emerald-500 outline-none placeholder-slate-600 pl-9 transition-all"/>
                                                    <Beaker className="absolute left-3 top-2.5 w-4 h-4 text-slate-500"/>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                            <div className="p-4 bg-slate-800 rounded-lg border border-slate-700 mt-2 text-center">
                                                <div className="text-[9px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase mb-1">{calcType === 'TOTAL' ? 'DOSIS TOTAL REQUERIDA' : 'RITMO INFUSIÓN (BOMBA)'}</div>
                                                <div className="text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tight text-emerald-400 leading-none">{calculateResult()}</div>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    
                                    <div className="bg-indigo-50 p-5 rounded-xl border border-indigo-100 shadow-sm">
                                        <h4 className="text-xs font-black text-indigo-800 uppercase mb-3 flex items-center"><Eye className="w-4 h-4 mr-2"/> LOS 5 CORRECTOS</h4>
                                        <ul className="text-[10px] text-indigo-900 space-y-2.5 font-bold uppercase tracking-tight">
                                            <li className="flex items-center"><div className="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-indigo-400 rounded-full mr-2"></div> 1. Paciente Correcto</li>
                                            <li className="flex items-center"><div className="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-indigo-400 rounded-full mr-2"></div> 2. Fármaco Correcto</li>
                                            <li className="flex items-center"><div className="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-indigo-400 rounded-full mr-2"></div> 3. Dosis Correcta</li>
                                            <li className="flex items-center"><div className="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-indigo-400 rounded-full mr-2"></div> 4. Vía Correcta</li>
                                            <li className="flex items-center"><div className="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-indigo-400 rounded-full mr-2"></div> 5. Hora Correcta</li>
                                        </ul>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                ) : (
                    <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-slate-300 select-none pointer-events-none bg-slate-50/50">
                        <div className="w-32 h-32 bg-slate-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-6 shadow-sm border border-slate-200">
                            <Pill className="w-14 h-14 text-slate-300"/>
                        </div>
                        <h3 className="font-black text-xl uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400">Seleccione un Fármaco</h3>
                        <p className="text-sm font-medium text-slate-400 mt-2 max-w-xs text-center">Navegue por el formulario para ver la monografía completa.</p>
                    </div>
                )}
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};
