        indications: ["Intubación (Secuencia Rápida)", "Relajación muscular"],
        dilution: "Directo (RSI) o en 50-100ml SF.",
        administrationRoute: "IV.",
        administrationTime: "Bolus rápido en inducción. Perfusión continua.",
        compatibility: "Incompatible con Hidrocortisona.",
        sideEffects: ["Anafilaxia (raro)", "Parálisis prolongada"],
        monitoring: "TOF (Tren de Cuatro). Requiere ventilación mecánica obligatoria.",
        safetyAlert: "PARALIZANTE. NO SEDA. Asegurar sedación profunda previa.",
        storage: 'FRIDGE',
        pregnancy: 'B',
        pharmacokinetics: { onset: "60-90 seg", peak: "N/A", duration: "30-60 min" }
    }
];

const DRUG_GROUPS = [
    { name: "UCI / Emergencias", color: "text-red-600", bg: "bg-red-50" },
    { name: "Inmunosupresores", color: "text-teal-600", bg: "bg-teal-50" },
    { name: "Anestesia / UCI", color: "text-indigo-600", bg: "bg-indigo-50" },
    { name: "Infectología", color: "text-blue-600", bg: "bg-blue-50" },
    { name: "Antídotos", color: "text-emerald-600", bg: "bg-emerald-50" },
    { name: "Neurología", color: "text-violet-600", bg: "bg-violet-50" },
    { name: "Psiquiatría", color: "text-pink-600", bg: "bg-pink-50" },
    { name: "Analgesia", color: "text-purple-600", bg: "bg-purple-50" },
    { name: "Cardiología", color: "text-rose-600", bg: "bg-rose-50" },
    { name: "Endocrino / Respiratorio", color: "text-orange-600", bg: "bg-orange-50" },
    { name: "Hematología", color: "text-slate-600", bg: "bg-slate-100" },
    { name: "Digestivo", color: "text-emerald-600", bg: "bg-emerald-50" },
    { name: "Ginecología", color: "text-fuchsia-600", bg: "bg-fuchsia-50" }
];

interface PharmacologyProps {
    initialQuery?: string;
}

export const Pharmacology: React.FC<PharmacologyProps> = ({ initialQuery }) => {
    const [query, setQuery] = useState(initialQuery || '');
    const [selectedDrug, setSelectedDrug] = useState<Drug | null>(null);
    const [filterGroup, setFilterGroup] = useState('ALL');
    const [favorites, setFavorites] = useState<string[]>([]);
    const [activeSection, setActiveSection] = useState<'ADMIN' | 'PREP' | 'SAFETY'>('ADMIN');
    const [listMode, setListMode] = useState<'AZ' | 'GROUP'>('AZ');
    
    // ADD DRUG STATE
    const [isAdding, setIsAdding] = useState(false);
    const [newDrugName, setNewDrugName] = useState('');
    const [isGenerating, setIsGenerating] = useState(false);
    const [customDrugs, setCustomDrugs] = useState<Drug[]>([]);

    // Calculator State
    const [calcWeight, setCalcWeight] = useState('');
    const [calcDose, setCalcDose] = useState('');
    const [calcConc, setCalcConc] = useState(''); // mg/ml
    const [calcType, setCalcType] = useState<'TOTAL' | 'RATE'>('TOTAL');
    
    // COMBINE STATIC AND CUSTOM DRUGS
    const allDrugs = useMemo(() => {
        return [...STATIC_DRUGS, ...customDrugs];
    }, [customDrugs]);

    useEffect(() => {
        if (initialQuery) {
            setQuery(initialQuery);
            const found = allDrugs.find(d => d.name.toLowerCase().includes(initialQuery.toLowerCase()));
            if(found) setSelectedDrug(found);
        }
    }, [initialQuery, allDrugs]);

    // Data Processing for List
    const processedList = useMemo(() => {
        let filtered = allDrugs.filter(d => {
            const matchesSearch = !query || 
                d.name.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()) || 
                d.brandNames.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()) ||
                d.indications.some(i => i.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()));
            
            const matchesGroup = filterGroup === 'ALL' ? true : filterGroup === 'FAV' ? favorites.includes(d.id) : d.group.includes(filterGroup);
            return matchesSearch && matchesGroup;
        }).sort((a,b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));

        if (listMode === 'AZ') {
            const groups: Record<string, Drug[]> = {};
            filtered.forEach(drug => {
                const letter = drug.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase();
                if(!groups[letter]) groups[letter] = [];
                groups[letter].push(drug);
            });
            return groups;
        } else {
            const groups: Record<string, Drug[]> = {};
            filtered.forEach(drug => {
                const grp = drug.group.split(' ')[0]; // Simplified group name
                if(!groups[grp]) groups[grp] = [];
                groups[grp].push(drug);
            });
            return groups;
        }
    }, [query, filterGroup, favorites, listMode, allDrugs]);

    const sortedKeys = Object.keys(processedList).sort();
    const alphabet = "#ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ".split('');

    const toggleFavorite = (id: string, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
        e.stopPropagation();
        setFavorites(prev => prev.includes(id) ? prev.filter(f => f !== id) : [...prev, id]);
    };

    const handleAddDrug = async () => {
        if (!newDrugName.trim()) return;
        setIsGenerating(true);
        try {
            const newDrug = await generateDrug(newDrugName);
            setCustomDrugs(prev => [...prev, newDrug]);
            setSelectedDrug(newDrug);
            setIsAdding(false);
            setNewDrugName('');
        } catch (error) {
            console.error("Error adding drug:", error);
            // In a real app, show a toast error
        } finally {
            setIsGenerating(false);
        }
    };

    const calculateResult = () => {
        if(!calcWeight || !calcDose) return "---";
        
        if (calcType === 'TOTAL') {
            // Total dose mg
            const totalMg = parseFloat(calcWeight) * parseFloat(calcDose);
            let volText = "";
            if(calcConc && parseFloat(calcConc) > 0) {
                const ml = totalMg / parseFloat(calcConc);
                volText = `  (${ml.toFixed(1)} ml)`;
            }
            return `${totalMg.toFixed(2)} mg${volText}`;
        } else {
            // Rate ml/h (Dose in mcg/kg/min -> Need Conc mg/ml)
            if(!calcConc || parseFloat(calcConc) <= 0) return "Falta Conc.";
            const doseMcgMin = parseFloat(calcDose) * parseFloat(calcWeight); // mcg/min
            const doseMgHour = (doseMcgMin * 60) / 1000; // mg/h
            const rate = doseMgHour / parseFloat(calcConc); // ml/h
            return `${rate.toFixed(1)} ml/h`;
        }
    };

    const getGroupColor = (group: string) => {
        const g = DRUG_GROUPS.find(gr => group.includes(gr.name.split(' ')[0]));
        return g ? `${g.bg} ${g.color}` : 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-500';
    };

    const getRouteIcon = (route: string) => {
        if (route.toLowerCase().includes('oral')) return <Tablet className="w-3 h-3 text-emerald-500"/>;
        if (route.toLowerCase().includes('iv') || route.toLowerCase().includes('perfusión')) return <Syringe className="w-3 h-3 text-rose-500"/>;
        if (route.toLowerCase().includes('nebulizada') || route.toLowerCase().includes('inhalada')) return <Wind className="w-3 h-3 text-cyan-500"/>;
        return <Pill className="w-3 h-3 text-slate-400"/>;
    };

    return (
        <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row h-full bg-slate-100 gap-0 pb-20 overflow-hidden animate-fade-in text-slate-900">
            
            {/* --- LEFT PANEL: LIST & NAVIGATION --- */}
            <div className={`lg:w-96 bg-white border-r border-slate-200 flex flex-col shrink-0 z-20 shadow-xl ${selectedDrug ? 'hidden lg:flex' : 'flex w-full'}`}>
                
                {/* Header Search */}
                <div className="p-4 bg-slate-900 text-white shrink-0 shadow-md z-10">
                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                        <h2 className="font-black text-xs tracking-widest text-emerald-400 uppercase flex items-center"><BookOpen className="w-4 h-4 mr-2"/> VADEMÉCUM PRO</h2>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                            <span className="text-[10px] bg-slate-800 px-2 py-1 rounded text-slate-400 font-mono border border-slate-700">{allDrugs.length} REF</span>
                            <button onClick={() => setIsAdding(!isAdding)} className="bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-500 text-white p-1 rounded-md transition-colors" title="Añadir Fármaco IA">
                                <Plus className="w-4 h-4"/>
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    {isAdding ? (
                        <div className="bg-slate-800 p-3 rounded-lg border border-slate-700 animate-slide-in-top mb-2">
                            <label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase mb-1 block flex items-center"><Wand2 className="w-3 h-3 mr-1 text-purple-400"/> Generador IA</label>
                            <div className="flex gap-2">
                                <input 
                                    value={newDrugName}
                                    onChange={e => setNewDrugName(e.target.value)}
                                    placeholder="Nombre del fármaco..." 
                                    className="flex-1 bg-slate-900 border border-slate-600 rounded p-1.5 text-xs text-white outline-none focus:border-emerald-500"
                                    onKeyDown={e => e.key === 'Enter' && handleAddDrug()}
                                />
                                <button onClick={handleAddDrug} disabled={isGenerating || !newDrugName} className="bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-500 text-white px-3 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold flex items-center disabled:opacity-50">
                                    {isGenerating ? <Loader2 className="w-3 h-3 animate-spin"/> : <Save className="w-3 h-3"/>}
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    ) : (
                        <div className="relative group">
                            <Search className="absolute left-3 top-2.5 text-slate-500 w-4 h-4 group-focus-within:text-emerald-500 transition-colors"/>
                            <input 
                                value={query}
                                onChange={e => setQuery(e.target.value)}
                                placeholder="Buscar fármaco, marca o indicación..." 
                                className="w-full pl-9 p-2.5 rounded-lg bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 text-sm text-white placeholder-slate-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 outline-none transition-all font-medium"
                            />
                            {query && <button onClick={() => setQuery('')} className="absolute right-3 top-2.5 text-slate-500 hover:text-white"><X className="w-4 h-4"/></button>}
                        </div>
                    )}
                </div>

                {/* Mode Toggles */}
                <div className="flex border-b border-slate-200 bg-white p-1 gap-1">
                    <button onClick={() => setListMode('AZ')} className={`flex-1 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase rounded-md flex items-center justify-center transition-all ${listMode === 'AZ' ? 'bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 ring-1 ring-indigo-200' : 'text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-50'}`}>
                        <List className="w-3 h-3 mr-1"/> Índice A-Z
                    </button>
                    <button onClick={() => setListMode('GROUP')} className={`flex-1 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase rounded-md flex items-center justify-center transition-all ${listMode === 'GROUP' ? 'bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 ring-1 ring-indigo-200' : 'text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-50'}`}>
                        <Layers className="w-3 h-3 mr-1"/> Grupos
                    </button>
                </div>

                {/* Filters */}
                <div className="flex gap-2 p-2 bg-slate-50 overflow-x-auto border-b border-slate-200 shrink-0 custom-scrollbar shadow-inner">
                    <button onClick={() => setFilterGroup('ALL')} className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md text-[10px] font-bold uppercase whitespace-nowrap border transition-all ${filterGroup === 'ALL' ? 'bg-slate-800 text-white border-slate-900' : 'bg-white border-slate-200 text-slate-500 hover:bg-slate-100'}`}>TODOS</button>
                    <button onClick={() => setFilterGroup('FAV')} className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md text-[10px] font-bold uppercase whitespace-nowrap border flex items-center transition-all ${filterGroup === 'FAV' ? 'bg-yellow-50 text-yellow-700 border-yellow-300' : 'bg-white border-slate-200 text-slate-500 hover:bg-slate-100'}`}><Star className="w-3 h-3 mr-1 fill-current"/> FAVORITOS</button>
                    {DRUG_GROUPS.map(g => (
                        <button key={g.name} onClick={() => setFilterGroup(g.name.split(' ')[0])} className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md text-[10px] font-bold uppercase whitespace-nowrap border transition-all ${filterGroup === g.name.split(' ')[0] ? `${g.bg} ${g.color} border-current` : 'bg-white border-slate-200 text-slate-500 hover:bg-slate-100'}`}>{g.name.split(' ')[0]}</button>
                    ))}
                </div>

                {/* List Content */}
                <div className="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">
                    {listMode === 'AZ' && (
                        <div className="hidden sm:flex flex-col w-6 items-center bg-slate-50 border-r border-slate-200 text-[9px] font-bold text-slate-400 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar hover:text-indigo-600 pt-1 select-none">
                            {alphabet.map(l => (
                                <button key={l} className="w-full text-center hover:bg-slate-200 hover:text-indigo-700 py-0.5 transition-colors">{l}</button>
                            ))}
                        </div>
                    )}
                    <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto bg-white custom-scrollbar">
                        {sortedKeys.map(key => (
                            <div key={key}>
                                <div className="sticky top-0 bg-slate-100 text-slate-500 text-[10px] font-black px-4 py-1.5 border-b border-slate-200 uppercase tracking-widest z-10 flex justify-between items-center shadow-sm">
                                    {key}
                                    <span className="bg-slate-200 px-1.5 rounded text-[9px]">{processedList[key].length}</span>
                                </div>
                                {processedList[key].map(drug => (
                                    <button key={drug.id} onClick={() => setSelectedDrug(drug)} className={`w-full text-left p-3 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all group relative border-l-4 border-b border-slate-50 ${selectedDrug?.id === drug.id ? 'bg-indigo-50 border-l-indigo-600' : 'border-l-transparent hover:border-l-slate-300'}`}>
                                        <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
                                            <div className="pr-2 overflow-hidden w-full">
                                                <div className={`font-black text-sm leading-tight mb-1 flex items-center ${selectedDrug?.id === drug.id ? 'text-indigo-900' : 'text-slate-800'}`}>
                                                    <span className="truncate">{drug.name}</span>
                                                    {drug.safetyAlert.includes("ALTO") && <AlertOctagon className="w-3 h-3 text-rose-500 ml-1.5 inline shrink-0 animate-pulse"/>}
                                                    {drug.safetyAlert.includes("RANGO ESTRECHO") && <Activity className="w-3 h-3 text-purple-500 ml-1.5 inline shrink-0"/>}
                                                    {drug.group === "Inmunosupresores" && <Biohazard className="w-3 h-3 text-yellow-600 ml-1.5 inline shrink-0"/>}
                                                    {drug.storage === 'FRIDGE' && <ThermometerSnowflake className="w-3 h-3 text-blue-500 ml-1.5 inline shrink-0"/>}
                                                    {drug.storage === 'PROTECT_LIGHT' && <Sun className="w-3 h-3 text-amber-500 ml-1.5 inline shrink-0"/>}
                                                </div>
                                                <div className="flex justify-between items-center w-full">
                                                    <div className="flex items-center">
                                                        <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-medium uppercase tracking-wide truncate mr-2">{drug.brandNames.split(',')[0]}</span>
                                                        {getRouteIcon(drug.administrationRoute)}
                                                    </div>
                                                    <span className={`text-[8px] px-1.5 rounded font-bold uppercase ml-2 ${getGroupColor(drug.group)}`}>{drug.group.split(' ')[0]}</span>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                            <div onClick={(e) => toggleFavorite(drug.id, e)} className="p-1 rounded-full hover:bg-slate-200 cursor-pointer shrink-0">
                                                <Star className={`w-4 h-4 ${favorites.includes(drug.id) ? 'fill-yellow-400 text-yellow-400' : 'text-slate-200 group-hover:text-slate-300'}`}/>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </button>
                                ))}
                            </div>
                        ))}
                        {sortedKeys.length === 0 && <div className="p-8 text-center text-slate-400 text-xs italic">No se encontraron fármacos.</div>}
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            {/* --- RIGHT PANEL: MONOGRAPH CONTENT --- */}
            <div className={`flex-1 flex flex-col bg-slate-50 overflow-hidden h-full relative ${!selectedDrug ? 'hidden lg:flex' : 'flex'}`}>
                {selectedDrug ? (
                    <div className="flex flex-col h-full animate-fade-in">
                        
                        {/* Header ISO Safety */}
                        <div className="bg-white border-b border-slate-200 shadow-sm shrink-0 z-10">
                            {/* Safety Banners */}
                            <div className="flex flex-wrap">
                                {selectedDrug.safetyAlert.includes("ALTO") && (
                                    <div className="bg-rose-600 text-white px-4 py-1 flex items-center gap-2 flex-1 justify-center border-r border-rose-500 shadow-inner">
                                        <ShieldAlert className="w-4 h-4 animate-pulse"/>
                                        <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest">ALTO RIESGO</span>
                                    </div>
                                )}
                                {selectedDrug.safetyAlert.includes("CITOSTÁTICO") && (
                                    <div className="bg-purple-700 text-white px-4 py-1 flex items-center gap-2 flex-1 justify-center border-r border-purple-600 shadow-inner">
                                        <Skull className="w-4 h-4"/>
                                        <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest">CITOSTÁTICO</span>
                                    </div>
                                )}
                                {selectedDrug.storage === 'FRIDGE' && (
                                    <div className="bg-blue-500 text-white px-4 py-1 flex items-center gap-2 flex-1 justify-center border-r border-blue-400 shadow-inner">
                                        <ThermometerSnowflake className="w-4 h-4"/>
                                        <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest">NEVERA (2-8ºC)</span>
                                    </div>
                                )}
                                {selectedDrug.storage === 'PROTECT_LIGHT' && (
                                    <div className="bg-amber-500 text-white px-4 py-1 flex items-center gap-2 flex-1 justify-center shadow-inner">
                                        <Sun className="w-4 h-4"/>
                                        <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest">FOTOSENSIBLE</span>
                                    </div>
                                )}
                            </div>

                            <div className="p-5">
                                <div className="flex gap-4 items-start mb-4">
                                    <button onClick={() => setSelectedDrug(null)} className="lg:hidden p-2 bg-slate-100 rounded-full text-slate-500 hover:bg-slate-200"><ArrowLeft className="w-5 h-5"/></button>
                                    <div className="flex-1">
                                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
                                            <span className={`text-[9px] font-black px-2 py-0.5 rounded border uppercase tracking-wide ${getGroupColor(selectedDrug.group)}`}>{selectedDrug.group}</span>
                                            {selectedDrug.pregnancy && (
                                                <span className={`text-[9px] font-black px-2 py-0.5 rounded border uppercase tracking-wide ${['D','X'].includes(selectedDrug.pregnancy) ? 'bg-rose-100 text-rose-700 border-rose-200' : 'bg-green-50 text-green-700 border-green-200'}`}>
                                                    EMBARAZO: CAT {selectedDrug.pregnancy}
                                                </span>
                                            )}
                                        </div>
                                        <h1 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-black text-slate-900 leading-none uppercase tracking-tight">{selectedDrug.name}</h1>
                                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1.5 text-xs font-bold text-slate-500">
                                            <span className="bg-slate-100 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded border border-slate-200 text-[10px] uppercase text-slate-400">Comercial</span>
                                            {selectedDrug.brandNames}
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div className="hidden md:block text-right bg-slate-50 p-2 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 min-w-[140px]">
                                        <div className="text-[9px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase mb-0.5 tracking-wide">PRESENTACIÓN</div>
                                        <div className="text-sm font-bold text-slate-800">{selectedDrug.presentation}</div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                                <div className="flex gap-2 border-t border-slate-100 pt-3 overflow-x-auto">
                                    {[
                                        {id: 'ADMIN', label: 'Administración', icon: Syringe},
                                        {id: 'PREP', label: 'Preparación', icon: FlaskConical},
                                        {id: 'SAFETY', label: 'Seguridad', icon: ShieldAlert}
                                    ].map(tab => (
                                        <button key={tab.id} onClick={() => setActiveSection(tab.id as any)} className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold flex items-center transition-all whitespace-nowrap ${activeSection === tab.id ? 'bg-indigo-600 text-white shadow-md' : 'bg-slate-50 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100'}`}>
                                            <tab.icon className={`w-3.5 h-3.5 mr-2 ${activeSection === tab.id ? 'text-white' : 'text-slate-400'}`}/> {tab.label}
                                        </button>
                                    ))}
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        {/* Content Area */}
                        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar p-6">
                            <div className="flex flex-col xl:flex-row gap-6 max-w-7xl mx-auto">
                                
                                {/* CARD: INFO */}
                                <div className="flex-1 space-y-6">
                                    
                                    {activeSection === 'ADMIN' && (
                                        <div className="space-y-4 animate-fade-in">
                                            <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                                                <div className="bg-white p-5 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm flex gap-4 hover:border-indigo-300 transition-colors group">
                                                    <div className="p-3 bg-emerald-50 rounded-lg text-emerald-600 h-fit group-hover:bg-emerald-100 transition-colors"><Syringe className="w-5 h-5"/></div>
                                                    <div>
                                                        <h4 className="text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">VÍA DE ADMINISTRACIÓN</h4>
                                                        <div className="font-bold text-slate-800 text-sm leading-relaxed">{selectedDrug.administrationRoute}</div>
                                                    </div>
                                                </div>
                                                <div className="bg-white p-5 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm flex gap-4 hover:border-indigo-300 transition-colors group">
                                                    <div className="p-3 bg-blue-50 rounded-lg text-blue-600 h-fit group-hover:bg-blue-100 transition-colors"><Clock className="w-5 h-5"/></div>
                                                    <div>
                                                        <h4 className="text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1">TIEMPO / VELOCIDAD</h4>
                                                        <div className="font-bold text-slate-800 text-sm leading-relaxed">{selectedDrug.administrationTime}</div>
                                                    </div>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                            
                                            <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
                                                <div className="bg-amber-50 px-5 py-3 border-b border-amber-100 flex items-center">
                                                    <Activity className="w-4 h-4 text-amber-600 mr-2"/>
                                                    <h3 className="font-black text-amber-800 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide">MONITORIZACIÓN ENFERMERÍA</h3>
                                                </div>
                                                <div className="p-5 text-sm text-slate-700 font-medium leading-relaxed flex items-start">
                                                    <Stethoscope className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-400 mr-3 shrink-0 mt-0.5"/>
                                                    {selectedDrug.monitoring}
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    )}

                                    {activeSection === 'PREP' && (
                                        <div className="space-y-6 animate-fade-in">
                                            <div className="bg-white p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm">
                                                <h3 className="font-black text-slate-800 text-sm uppercase mb-4 flex items-center border-b border-slate-100 pb-2"><Droplets className="w-4 h-4 mr-2 text-indigo-500"/> DILUCIÓN Y ESTABILIDAD</h3>
                                                <div className="bg-indigo-50 p-4 rounded-lg border border-indigo-100 mb-4 text-sm text-indigo-900 font-medium leading-relaxed border-l-4 border-l-indigo-400">
                                                    {selectedDrug.dilution}
                                                </div>

Currently, I'm evaluating both on-premise and cloud-based systems, weighing the pros and cons of each. Data privacy regulations are a major factor driving my analysis of storage possibilities.


**Examining Persistence Solutions**

I'm now investigating different persistence strategies for the SPA. It's clear that the current `useState` approach leads to data loss on refresh, so I'm considering alternatives. My analysis so far focuses on the specific context of the educational web app, and I'm comparing a backend database to local storage within the browser. The database approach feels more robust, however the setup required may complicate it.


**Determining Storage Strategy**

I've determined that `localStorage` is the best choice here.  The educational context negates complex backend needs, and I can implement it directly in the React code. Specifically, the ClinicalFollowUp.tsx component seems the best place to implement the "save" functionality. I'll need to write the logic for storing and retrieving data from `localStorage`.


**Implement Persistence Strategy**

I've outlined the new implementation strategy: I'll now modify the state initialization to check `localStorage` first, thus providing data persistence across sessions. A `useEffect` hook will store the updated `patients` array whenever it changes. This is now planned in the ClinicalFollowUp.tsx component. I am also planning on implementing a reset mechanism for debugging purposes. I've sketched the code changes, as well.


**Detailing the Implementation**

I'm now detailing the implementation, specifically outlining the fix and providing the code update for `ClinicalFollowUp.tsx`. To explain why the data disappears, it's currently held in-memory. To fix this, I'm using `localStorage`.  I'm adding a `useEffect` hook to save the `patients` array whenever it changes. I'll stick to a lazy initialization pattern within `useState` and address JSON parsing errors in the future.


**Developing Reset Mechanism**

I'm now focusing on a button or indicator to reset the simulated database, as it's useful for testing. I've considered how best to integrate this reset functionality, given the use of `localStorage`. I'm starting to sketch the code for the reset button, keeping in mind the need for a clean and efficient implementation. Esto permitirá que la aplicación funcione como una base de datos local real en tu dispositivo sin necesidad de configurar un servidor externo.

Aquí tienes los cambios para `components/ClinicalFollowUp.tsx`:

1.  **Carga Inicial:** Al arrancar, el sistema buscará si hay datos guardados. Si no, cargará los datos de ejemplo.

**Analyzing the Nursing App**

I'm focusing now on understanding the project's core goal: creating a detailed technical specification for the "Enfermería PAE - Proyecto Vivo v21.0" nursing application. I'm digging into the specifics of this nursing application, which, as I see it, is critical. This initial grasp is paramount for the next steps. I'm breaking down the requirement to understand its components.


**Define Core Entities**

I've been defining the essential entities for this nursing app. I'm focusing on users, pathologies, drugs, the nursing process (PAE), simulated patients, and notes. The domain is nursing education and practice simulation. I'm considering that the backend design will have to support a mix of data types, and I'm currently leaning towards a relational database for its structured data capability.


**Weigh Database Options**

I'm presently considering database choices for the project. While NoSQL offers agility for JSON data, I'm leaning toward PostgreSQL, given clinical data's need for strict consistency and relationships. However, I'll recommend incorporating JSONB columns for flexible data portions. My entity breakdown includes Users, Pathologies, Drugs, Simulated Patients, Clinical Records, and PAE Data, and I've sketched initial API endpoints.


**Elaborating Feature Sets**

I'm now diving into the features, expanding on the core functionalities of the nursing app. I've pinpointed key operations for drugs and simulation, with an admin/AI note. Security's a priority, considering JWT, bcrypt, RBAC, and input validation. Testing will follow, using Jest/Supertest.

I'm finalizing the frontend strategy. I'm focusing on defining screen routes based on the current app. For state management, React Query (TanStack Query) looks ideal for server-side data, with Zustand or Context API handling client-side components. The responsive design is being considered for accessibility.


**Develop Frontend Strategy**

I'm now outlining the frontend strategy for the nursing app, emphasizing a mobile-first design using Tailwind CSS classes for responsive layouts, like `hidden md:block` and `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2`. This initial approach is helping to optimize the user experience across devices.


**Summarizing Key Elements**

I'm now pulling together key components of the nursing app. The frontend, including screens, state management (with React Query for server data and Zustand/Context for client), and responsiveness are all in focus. Security, and robust testing are both in place. I'm focusing on output, so I will draft a DB schema, API routes, and React architecture. Since the current app is using static data, I'll bridge that to a real-world stack (Node.js/Express + PostgreSQL).

Aquí tienes la **Especificación Técnica Completa (Backend & Frontend)** para transformar "Enfermería PAE" en una aplicación Full-Stack robusta, escalable y profesional.

---

# 🏗️ 4. BACKEND: Arquitectura y Especificaciones

**Tecnologías sugeridas:** Node.js (Express/NestJS) + PostgreSQL (Relacional para consistencia clínica) + Prisma ORM.

## A. Modelo de Datos Completo (Schema)

### 1. `users` (Usuarios)
Tabla para gestionar el acceso de estudiantes y administradores.
*   `id` (PK): UUID.
*   `email`: String (Unique, Indexed).
*   `password_hash`: String (Bcrypt).
*   `full_name`: String.
*   `role`: Enum ('STUDENT', 'ADMIN', 'TEACHER').
*   `created_at`: Timestamp.

### 2. `pathologies` (Base de Datos Clínica)
Catálogo enciclopédico de enfermedades.
*   `id` (PK): UUID.
*   `name`: String (Indexed - Búsqueda rápida).
*   `system`: Enum ('Cardiología', 'Respiratorio', etc.) (Indexed).
*   `definition`: Text.
*   `clinical_data`: JSONB. *Contiene: etiología, valoración, cuadro clínico (síntomas/signos), alertas.*
*   `nanda_refs`: JSONB. *Array de objetos {code, label, related_to}.*
*   `created_by`: FK -> users.id (quién la creó/validó).

### 3. `drugs` (Vademécum)
*   `id` (PK): UUID.
*   `name`: String (Nombre genérico) (Indexed).
*   `brand_names`: Array<String> (Indexed).
*   `group`: String (Indexed).
*   `administration`: JSONB. *Contiene: vía, dilución, tiempo, compatibilidad.*
*   `safety`: JSONB. *Contiene: alertas alto riesgo, embarazo, almacenamiento.*
*   `pharmacokinetics`: JSONB. *Onset, Peak, Duration.*

### 4. `patients` (Simulación / HCE)
Pacientes virtuales creados para los casos clínicos.
*   `id` (PK): UUID.
*   `user_id`: FK -> users.id (Estudiante dueño del caso).
*   `demographics`: JSONB. *Nombre, edad, sexo, peso, alergias.*
*   `diagnosis`: String.
*   `status`: Enum ('ACTIVE', 'DISCHARGED', 'DECEASED').

### 5. `clinical_records` (Evolución y Constantes)
Historial cronológico del paciente.
*   `id` (PK): UUID.
*   `patient_id`: FK -> patients.id (Indexed).
*   `timestamp`: Date (Indexed).
*   `type`: Enum ('NOTE', 'VITALS', 'BALANCE', 'TASK').
*   `data`: JSONB.
    *   *Si es VITALS: { ta: "120/80", fc: 80... }*
    *   *Si es NOTE: { text: "Paciente estable...", tags: ["#Hemodinámica"] }*

### 6. `active_pae` (Planes de Cuidados Activos)
*   `id` (PK): UUID.
*   `patient_id`: FK -> patients.id.
*   `nanda_code`: String.
*   `noc_goals`: Text.
*   `nic_interventions`: Array<String>.
*   `status`: Enum ('ACTIVE', 'RESOLVED').

---

## B. Endpoints de la API (RESTful)

### 🔐 Autenticación (`/api/auth`)
*   `POST /register`: Crea usuario. Body: `{email, password, name}`.
*   `POST /login`: Retorna JWT. Body: `{email, password}`.
*   `GET /me`: Datos del usuario actual. (Requiere Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`).

### 🗂️ Patologías (`/api/pathologies`)
*   `GET /`: Listar con filtros. Query: `?system=Cardio&search=Infarto`. (Cacheable).
*   `GET /:id`: Detalle completo.
*   `POST /`: Crear nueva (Solo Admin/AI Service). Body: Objeto Pathology completo.

### 💊 Fármacos (`/api/drugs`)
*   `GET /`: Búsqueda y filtrado. Query: `?group=Antibioticos&search=Amoxi`.
*   `POST /`: Añadir fármaco manual o vía IA.

### 🏥 Simulación de Pacientes (`/api/patients`)
*   `GET /`: Listar mis pacientes activos. (Auth: Student).
*   `POST /`: Ingresar nuevo paciente. Body: `{demographics, diagnosis}`.
*   `GET /:id/timeline`: Obtener toda la historia clínica (notas y constantes) ordenada.
*   `POST /:id/evolution`: Añadir nota o constantes. Body: `{type: 'VITALS', data: {...}}`.
*   `PATCH /:id/checklist`: Actualizar tareas del turno.

---

## C. Seguridad

1.  **Autenticación:**
    *   **JWT (JSON Web Tokens):** Con expiración corta (15 min) y Refresh Tokens (7 días) en cookies `HttpOnly` para prevenir XSS.
2.  **Validación de Datos:**
    *   Uso de **Zod** o **Joi** en el backend para validar que el `body` de las peticiones coincida con el esquema antes de procesarlo.
3.  **Protección de Contraseñas:**
    *   Hashing con **Bcrypt** o **Argon2** antes de guardar en DB.
4.  **CORS (Cross-Origin Resource Sharing):**
    *   Configurado para aceptar peticiones solo desde el dominio del frontend (ej: `app.enfermeria-pae.com`).
5.  **Rate Limiting:**
    *   Limitar peticiones por IP para evitar fuerza bruta en el login o abuso de la IA.

---

## D. Estrategia de Tests

1.  **Tests Unitarios (Jest):**
    *   Probar lógica pura: Cálculos de dosis (asegurar que la fórmula es correcta), conversores de unidades, validadores de escalas (Glasgow no puede ser > 15).
2.  **Tests de Integración (Supertest):**
    *   Levantar una DB de prueba.
    *   Probar el flujo completo: Registrar usuario -> Login -> Obtener Token -> Crear Paciente -> Verificar que el paciente existe en DB.
3.  **Tests E2E (Cypress/Playwright):**
    *   Simular al usuario haciendo clic en "Añadir Fármaco", rellenando el formulario y viendo el resultado en la lista.

---

# 💻 5. FRONTEND: Estructura y Lógica

**Tecnologías:** React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, React Query (TanStack Query), Zustand (Estado Global).

## A. Estructura de Pantallas (Routing)

1.  **Auth (`/auth`)**:
    *   **Login/Registro:** Formularios limpios con validación en tiempo real. Redirección al Dashboard tras éxito.
2.  **Dashboard (`/`)**:
    *   **Centro de Mando:** Widgets de resumen (Pacientes activos, Alertas pendientes). Acceso rápido a herramientas.
3.  **Estación de Pacientes (`/patients`)**:
    *   **Lista (Sidebar):** Censo de pacientes con semáforo de gravedad.
    *   **HCE (Detalle):** La vista compleja con pestañas (Evolución, Gráficas, PAE, Balance).
4.  **Biblioteca Clínica (`/library`)**:
    *   **Patologías:** Buscador + Filtros laterales. Modal o página dedicada para la Ficha Técnica.
    *   **Vademécum:** Lista A-Z + Panel de detalle (Split view).
5.  **Herramientas (`/tools`)**:
    *   **Calculadoras:** Grid de tarjetas. Al hacer clic, abre la calculadora específica.
    *   **Asistente IA:** Interfaz tipo chat con historial lateral.

## B. Estado y Comunicación

1.  **Estado del Servidor (Server State) - React Query:**
    *   **¿Por qué?** Para manejar `isLoading`, `isError`, y **Caché**.
    *   *Ejemplo:* Al buscar "Ibuprofeno", React Query guarda el resultado. Si vuelves a buscarlo 1 minuto después, lo muestra instantáneamente sin llamar a la API.
    *   **Invalidación:** Cuando añades un paciente (`mutation`), le dices a React Query "Refresca la lista de pacientes".

2.  **Estado Global (Client State) - Zustand:**
    *   Para datos que no vienen de la API pero persisten en la sesión.
    *   *Ejemplo:* `userSession` (token, nombre), `sidebarCollapsed` (preferencia visual), `currentTheme`.

3.  **Manejo de Carga y Errores:**
    *   **Skeletons:** Mientras cargan los datos de la API, mostrar "esqueletos" grises animados (formas de tarjetas) en lugar de un spinner giratorio, para mejorar la percepción de velocidad.
    *   **Toasts:** Notificaciones flotantes para éxito ("Guardado") o error ("Fallo de conexión").

## C. Diseño Responsive (Mobile First)

El enfoque es que la enfermera/estudiante usa esto en una **tablet** en el control o en un **móvil** a pie de cama.

1.  **Breakpoints Clave:**
    *   `md` (768px): Punto de quiebre entre móvil y tablet/escritorio.
2.  **Estrategias de Adaptación:**
    *   **Navegación:**
        *   *Móvil:* Barra inferior fija (Bottom Nav) para el pulgar + Menú hamburguesa.
        *   *Escritorio:* Sidebar lateral expandible.
    *   **Vistas de Lista/Detalle:**
        *   *Móvil:* Al hacer clic en un paciente de la lista, navega a una nueva pantalla completa.
        *   *Escritorio:* Diseño "Split View" (Lista a la izquierda, Detalle a la derecha) para aprovechar el ancho.
    *   **Tablas y Gráficas:**
        *   *Móvil:* Las tablas complejas (Balance Hídrico) se transforman en tarjetas apiladas o permiten scroll horizontal.
    *   **Inputs:**
        *   Tamaño mínimo de botón `44px` (dedo).
        *   Inputs numéricos (`type="tel"`) para abrir teclado numérico en móvil al meter constantes.

---

**Resumen de la evolución:**
Pasamos de un prototipo estático (archivos `.tsx` con datos `const`) a una **arquitectura de software real**, separando la lógica de negocio (API/Backend) de la interfaz (Frontend), asegurando que los datos persistan, estén seguros y sean accesibles desde cualquier dispositivo.
